sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24237" key="deuteragwniste/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δευτερᾰγωνιστ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n24237.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">play second-class parts,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:124" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.124</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
